info.name: RemyCareConnect API v6 - Escalations / Assignments / Appointments
info.description: Updated February 2026. Reflects DB migration 018: added Escalations (CHW→Nurse case flow), Mother-CHW Assignments (full CRUD + nurse team view), and Appointment Schedule (full CRUD with date filtering). Previous v6 changes: users.name split into first_name + last_name, email column added.

exec: // Auto-refresh token if expiring in next 5 minutes

request.description: Check if the API server is running and healthy

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Hybrid authentication system with JWT and sessions

request.description: Register a new mother. first_name, last_name, and email are the new fields. email is optional.
Register a new CHW. license_number and location are required for CHW/Nurse roles.
Register a new Nurse.

exec: console.log('OTP verified. You can now login.');

request.description: Verify OTP to activate account. On success the role profile row (CHW/Nurse/Mother) is auto-created.
Login. Response now includes first_name, last_name, email, and name (joined).

exec: console.log('✅ Mother profile created. ID: ' + pm.response.json().mother_id);

request.description: Complete mother profile (dob and due_date are now nullable — can be left out and filled later from dashboard).
Update mother profile. Accepts first_name + last_name (preferred) OR full_name (auto-split on first space). All fields optional.

exec: console.log('✅ CHW profile created. ID: ' + pm.response.json().chw_id);

request.description: Update CHW profile. Accepts first_name + last_name (preferred) OR full_name (auto-split). All fields optional.
Assign a mother to this CHW. Max 20 active mothers per CHW. Uses {{chw_id}} and {{mother_id}} from environment.

exec: console.log('✅ Nurse profile created. ID: ' + pm.response.json().nurse_id);

request.description: Update Nurse profile. Accepts first_name + last_name (preferred) OR full_name (auto-split). All fields optional.

item.name: Next of Kin
item.description: Next of Kin management for mothers

item.name: Profile Photos
item.description:
Upload and manage profile photos for each user role.

All write/read endpoints require Bearer token ({{access_token}}).
The file-serving endpoint (GET .../file/<filename>) is public — the UUID in the filename acts as the access control.

Flow:
1. Upload Photo → saves file and returns file_url
2. Get My Photo → returns metadata + URL
3. Open file_url in browser to view the actual image

formdata.description: Select a jpg / jpeg / png / webp image (max 5 MB)

request.description:
Upload (or replace) the logged-in user's profile photo.

• Body: multipart/form-data with field name `photo`
• Accepted types: jpg, jpeg, png, webp
• Max size: 5 MB
• Previous active photo is automatically deactivated (kept for audit history)
• Returns: photo_id, file_url, file_name, file_size, mime_type, uploaded_at
Get the current logged-in user's active profile photo metadata.

Get any user's active photo by their user_id.
Useful for CHWs viewing a mother's photo, or nurses viewing CHW profiles.
Replace {{user_id}} with the target user's ID.

Serve the actual image bytes. No authentication required — the UUID in the filename acts as access control.

Replace the filename with the file_url path returned by the upload or get endpoints.

Example full URL: {{base_url}}/api/v1/profile/photo/file/user_3_f4a1b2c3d4e5.jpg
Deactivate (soft-delete) the current user's active profile photo. The file and DB record are kept for audit purposes but the photo is no longer returned as active.

item.name: Assignments (Mother-CHW)
item.description: Mother-CHW assignment management. A CHW can be assigned multiple mothers (up to 20 active). Nurses can view all CHWs assigned under them.

exec: console.log('✅ Mother assigned. Assignment ID: ' + d.assignment_id);

request.description: Assign a mother to a CHW. If an inactive assignment already exists for this CHW+Mother pair it is reactivated instead of creating a duplicate. Max 20 active assignments per CHW.
List all mothers assigned to a specific CHW (active assignments only).
List assignments with optional filters: chw_id, mother_id, nurse_id, status (active/inactive).
Set status to 'active' or 'inactive'. Re-activating counts toward the 20-mother limit.
Hard-delete an assignment record. Use status PATCH to deactivate instead where audit trail is needed.
List all CHWs (and their assigned mothers) that are in the same ward as the nurse.

item.name: Escalations
item.description: Escalation management — CHW raises a case to a nurse. Tracks status through open → in_progress → resolved/rejected.

body.raw:
{
  "chw_id": {{chw_id}},
  "nurse_id": {{nurse_id}},
  "mother_id": {{mother_id}},
  "case_description": "Mother is experiencing severe headaches and elevated blood pressure.",
  "issue_type": "hypertension",
  "priority": "high",
  "notes": "Advised rest and hydration. BP reading: 150/95."
}

request.description: Create a new escalation. Required: chw_id, nurse_id, mother_id, case_description. Optional: issue_type, priority (low/medium/high/critical, default medium), notes.
List escalations with optional filters: chw_id, nurse_id, mother_id, status (open/in_progress/resolved/rejected), priority (low/medium/high/critical).
Update escalation status. Valid transitions: open → in_progress → resolved/rejected. Setting status to 'resolved' or 'rejected' auto-sets resolved_at timestamp. notes field is optional.
Partially update an escalation record. Editable fields: case_description, issue_type, priority, notes. Status changes should use the /status endpoint.
Hard-delete an escalation. Only allowed when status is 'open' to prevent losing resolved case history.

item.name: Appointments
item.description: Appointment schedule management. Mothers, CHWs and Nurses can schedule and track visits. Supports date range filtering and recurring appointments.

body.raw:
{
  "mother_id": {{mother_id}},
  "health_worker_id": {{chw_id}},
  "scheduled_time": "2026-03-15T10:00:00",
  "appointment_type": "prenatal_checkup",
  "location": "Nairobi Central Health Center",
  "notes": "Routine 28-week checkup. Bring previous scan results.",
  "recurrence": "none"
}

request.description: Create a new appointment. Required: mother_id, health_worker_id, scheduled_time (ISO 8601). Optional: appointment_type, location, notes, recurrence (none/weekly/biweekly/monthly, default none).
List appointments with optional filters: mother_id, health_worker_id, status (scheduled/completed/cancelled/rescheduled), from (YYYY-MM-DD), to (YYYY-MM-DD).
Partially update appointment fields: scheduled_time, appointment_type, location, notes, recurrence, health_worker_id.
Update appointment status. Valid values: scheduled, completed, cancelled, rescheduled.
Hard-delete an appointment. Prefer updating status to 'cancelled' to preserve history.
